title: polystichum munitum var. incisoserratum
intro: Polystichum munitum var. incisoserratum is a variety of the Western sword fern, a type of evergreen fern native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly by the indigenous peoples of the region, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polystichum munitum var. incisoserratum include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its use as a treatment for skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the fronds in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
